migrations.name: core schema foundation
migrations.description: Create the first AquaPulse relational schema foundation for ponds, water quality, feed, tasks, alerts, alert history, and saved alert views.

migrations.name: audit persistence foundation
migrations.description: Add durable audit event storage and request-context metadata for bounded internal runtime auditing.

migrations.name: ai log persistence foundation
migrations.description: Add durable AI request and response log storage for bounded advisory-only operator assistance history.

migrations.name: pond responsibility foundation
migrations.description: Add durable pond responsibility mapping to support future pond-scoped authorization seams without changing current runtime behavior.
